equipment.medal: Spirit of Arsene Ending of the year
equipment.head: None

character_buff.name: Memorise
character_buff.description: Cuts the casting time for the next skill you use by re-routing arcane energies through more efficient channels.

effects: Cool time resets with 2% chance when the buff expires
Cool time resets with 20% chance when the buff expires
Cool time resets with 25% chance when the buff expires
Cool time resets with 30% chance when the buff expires
Cool time resets with 35% chance when the buff expires

skills.name: Fireball
skills.description: Casts a devastating fireball that incinerates all enemies in its path.

skills.name: Burning Hands
skills.description: Increases Fire RES by imbuing Fire attribute to allies attack.

skills.name: Flame Ground
skills.description: Sets [Flame Ground] inflicting constant Fire ATK.

skills.name: Freezing Spear
skills.description: Creates a magical glacial spear that launches itself at enemies.
skills.target: Up to 3 enemies 8m away and within a 1.75m radius

skills.name: Chilling Touch
skills.description: Increases Ice RES by imbuing Ice attribute to allies attack.

skills.name: Frost Cloud
skills.description: By surrounding them with a cloud of ice, it freezes enemies.
skills.target: Up to 6 enemies 8m away and within a 3.5m radius

skills.name: Deluge
skills.description: Sets [Deluge] inflicting constant Ice ATK in the ground.

skills.name: Lightning
skills.description: Strikes an enemy with a bolt of lightning.
skills.target: 1 enemy within a range of 10m

skills.name: Electric Charger
skills.description: Increases Lightning RES by imbuing Lightning attribute to allies attack.

skills.name: Shock Wave
skills.description: Electrocutes surrounding enemies by an electrical field.
skills.target: Up to 7 enemies within a range of 5m

skills.name: Tornado Holding
skills.description: Summon a [Tornado] to bombard enemies with lightning attacks.

skills.name: Hell Breath
skills.description: To set enemies ablaze, it causes a jet of flame to burst forth from your hands.
skills.target: Up to 6 enemies 6m away and at an angle of 80 degrees

skills.name: Infernal Flames
skills.description: A pillar of Flames of Hell blazes up from the ground, incinerating all enemies within range.
skills.target: Up to 8 enemies within a range of 5m

skills.name: Meteor Strike
skills.description: Brings a blazing meteor down upon the heads of your enemies.

skills.name: Firewall
skills.description: Summons a wall of fire.
skills.target: Up to 8 enemies 8m away and within 4m width

skills.name: Lava Plasma
skills.description: Fire RES and Fire attribute ATK increases much but Ice RES decreases.

skills.name: Blazing Pillar
skills.description: Summons a huge pillar of fire that sets enemies ablaze.

skills.name: Volcanic Eruption
skills.description: Creates a volcanic eruption by accumulating magma beneath the ground.

stances.name: Occult Magic

skills.name: Tenseness
skills.description: Deals damage with strong magnetic wave with attribute of holding weapon.
skills.target: Up to 18 enemies within a range of 6m

skills.name: Ice Vrille
skills.description: Creates a sharp ice pick in a straight line to pierce enemies from the bottom.
skills.target: Up to 12 enemies 15m away and within 5m width

skills.name: Breath of Fire
skills.description: Breathes strong fire to targets.
skills.target: Up to 20 during casting time

skills.name: Electric Bluster
skills.description: Creates a lightning ball and makes it explode to deal damage to enemy and nearby targets.
skills.target: Up to 30 during casting time

skills.name: Abyss Flare
skills.description: Concentrate the magic power into a single focal point, and deliver a great punch to the enemies.

lv25_bonus_extra: [RE: PvE] Skill DMG increases equal to 8% of extra [INT]
[PVP/PVE Maps] Additional 4% DMG according to extra [INT]
Ignore additional RES according to extra [INT] * 4
Additional DMG against Monster according to 4 * 50

skills.name: Refriger Wave
skills.description: Freezes the ground under a group of enemies, inflicting ice damage.
skills.target: Up to 10 enemies 10m away and within 3m width

skills.name: Absolute Zero
skills.description: Powerful ice attack to one enemy.
skills.target: 1 enemy within a range of 8m

skills.name: Blizzard
skills.description: Summons an ice storm that relentlessly attacks the enemy.

skills.name: Frozen Field
skills.description: Generates an aura of ice that freezes surroundings.
skills.target: Up to 12 enemies within a range of 8m

skills.name: Ice Plasma
skills.description: Ice RES and Ice attribute ATK increases much but Lightning RES decreases.

skills.name: Glacial Lance
skills.description: Fires sharp ice projectiles at the target and surrounding enemies.

skills.name: Fridged Stroke
skills.description: Summons hail from the sky to rain down upon the enemies.

skills.name: Thunderstorm
skills.description: Causes a thunderstorm to form over the caster, inflicting random lightning damage on enemies in the vicinity.

skills.name: Chain Lightning
skills.description: Conjure forth a bolt of chain lightning that leaps from one enemy to the next, inflicting lightning damage on the target and surrounding enemies.

skills.name: Enchanted Arm
skills.description: A spell that imbues your arm with the power of lightning. Effect disappears when stance changes.

skills.name: Charged Bolt
skills.description: Releases a surge of electricity that attacks surrounding enemies.
skills.target: Up to 3 targets 10m away and within a radius of 1.75m

skills.name: Electric Plasma
skills.description: Lightning RES and Lightning attribute ATK increases much but Fire RES decreases.

skills.name: Lightning Blast
skills.description: Discharges an electrical tornado.
skills.target: Up to 6 enemies 6m away and at an angle of 80 degrees

skills.name: Frenzied Thunder
skills.description: Conjures a tempest that destroys everything in its path.
skills.target: Up to 12 enemies within a range of 8m

stances.name: Forgotten Trick

skills.name: Key Card
skills.description: Concentrate your mind and draw one card from the deck. The drawn card has different effects depending on the result.

skills.name: Flame Flush
skills.description: Create a fireball using 5 flush cards and shoot it at a single target.

skills.name: Straight Flower
skills.description: Summon a chessboard that deals damage to enemies within range using 5 straight cards.

skills.name: Cursed Bluffing
skills.description: Adopt a poker face, cursing the attacker who attacked you. No one knows what kind of curse will be inflicted.

skills.name: Royal Straight Crystal
skills.description: Infuse powerful magic into a Royal Straight hand, dealing damage to enemies within range.

lv25_bonus_extra: [RE: PvE] Skill DMG increases equal to 10% of extra [INT]
[PVP/PVE Maps] Additional 3% DMG according to extra [INT]
Ignore additional RES according to extra [INT] * 2

skills.name: Flame Strike

skills.target: Up to 5 enemies 12m away and within a 4m radius

skills.name: Ice Partisan
skills.description: A massive ice attack on a single target.
skills.target: 1 enemy within a range of 14m

skills.name: Electric Storm
skills.description: Pound the enemies within range several times with lightning magic.
skills.target: Up to 3 times

skills.name: Void Elemental
skills.description: Neutralize the enemy with the explosion of concentrated magic power.
skills.target: 15 enemies within 3m - 12m, 8m radius

skills.name: Seduction
skills.description: Spread the illusionary magic that attracts nearby enemies.

skills.name: Doom Barrage
skills.description: Continuously drop massive stones above the enemys head.

skills.name: Medusa
skills.description: Instantly petrify enemies while withering their very essence.
